title: Thaumia!
description: A magic mod based on aura and taint
body:
Needs Curios API!
Needs Gecko Lib

 

This mod was originally intended to be an addon for Thaumcraft, but i decided to turn it in an independent mod

 

This mod is based in the duality between Good and Evil

You can be a powerful wizard or the destroyer of worlds

 

This mod adds

4 new tipes of ingots

2 new villagers

Magic gauntlets (WIP)

Wands (WIP)

New banners

Greatwood, Silverwood, Tainted and Petrified trees

Magic Crystals

and MORE

 

There will be a fabric port

 

Addons and Modpacks allowed!
